ko: An ancient being of living ice, ruling the frozen depths with absolute cold.

en: A hyena-headed pack hunter. Dangerous in numbers, manageable alone — but they rarely travel alone.
ko: A hyena-headed pack hunter. Dangerous in numbers, manageable alone — but they rarely travel alone.

en: A commanding gnoll that drives its kin to fight harder. Eliminating it early breaks a group's momentum.
ko: A commanding gnoll that drives its kin to fight harder. Eliminating it early breaks a group's momentum.

ko: A gnoll priest who calls down holy bolts from range. Prioritize it before it heals its allies.

ko: A fearsome gnoll champion that leads from the front. High HP and brutal melee — expect a long fight.

en: A common raider with little durability. Not dangerous alone, but often the first sign of a crowded fight.
ko: A common raider with little durability. Not dangerous alone, but often the first sign of a crowded fight.

en: The apex of dragonkind, wielding multiple elements and tremendous HP. Nothing here is wasted.
ko: The apex of dragonkind, wielding multiple elements and tremendous HP. Nothing here is wasted.

ko: A dark champion who advances with cold discipline. It punishes panic, overextension, and weak resolve. Will and positioning matter as much as raw durability here.

en: A larger, meaner cousin of the goblin. Tougher than it looks and often found in mixed groups.
ko: A larger, meaner cousin of the goblin. Tougher than it looks and often found in mixed groups.

en: A fast-flying insect that moves unpredictably. Difficult to pin down, and its sting may poison.
ko: A fast-flying insect that moves unpredictably. Difficult to pin down, and its sting may poison.

en: A swift pack animal bred to chase. Individually harmless, but hard to shake in numbers.
ko: A swift pack animal bred to chase. Individually harmless, but hard to shake in numbers.

en: A cold demon with high HP and punishing attacks. Cold resistance dulls its worst output.
ko: A cold demon with high HP and punishing attacks. Cold resistance dulls its worst output.

en: A cold dragon of great power and resilience. Cold resistance reduces the worst of its output.
ko: A cold dragon of great power and resilience. Cold resistance reduces the worst of its output.

en: A construct of pure iron that ignores most magic. Physical force is the most reliable answer.
ko: A construct of pure iron that ignores most magic. Physical force is the most reliable answer.

en: A quick scavenger that bites and retreats. More annoying than lethal, but dangerous in a crowd.
ko: A quick scavenger that bites and retreats. More annoying than lethal, but dangerous in a crowd.

en: A nimble and opportunistic tunnel dweller. Its speed and position matter more than its strength.
ko: A nimble and opportunistic tunnel dweller. Its speed and position matter more than its strength.

en: An ancient undead archmage who casts powerful spells and resists cold. Disrupting it early is better than weathering its output.
ko: An ancient undead archmage who casts powerful spells and resists cold. Disrupting it early is better than weathering its output.

en: A winged predator that launches spike volleys from range. Do not let it maintain distance.
ko: A winged predator that launches spike volleys from range. Do not let it maintain distance.

en: A horned giant raised in the deep tunnels. Cold-resistant and ferocious in melee.
ko: A horned giant raised in the deep tunnels. Cold-resistant and ferocious in melee.

en: An ancient undead wrapped in curses. Cold-resistant and capable of landing debilitating effects.
ko: An ancient undead wrapped in curses. Cold-resistant and capable of landing debilitating effects.

en: A massive brute with crushing melee power. Slow but capable of ending a fight in a single bad turn.
ko: A massive brute with crushing melee power. Slow but capable of ending a fight in a single bad turn.

en: A veteran ogre whose blows hit harder than most. Give it space or you will regret it quickly.
ko: A veteran ogre whose blows hit harder than most. Give it space or you will regret it quickly.

en: A hulking mage combining brute force with arcane power. Neither its fists nor its spells should be underestimated.
ko: A hulking mage combining brute force with arcane power. Neither its fists nor its spells should be underestimated.

ko: A brutal warrior who wins through direct force. Stronger than the smallest dungeon vermin and often backed by allies.

en: An orcish healer who sustains its allies. Killing it first makes the rest of the encounter manageable.
ko: An orcish healer who sustains its allies. Killing it first makes the rest of the encounter manageable.

en: An elite orc commander backed by loyal troops. Dangerous on its own — worse surrounded by allies.
ko: An elite orc commander backed by loyal troops. Dangerous on its own — worse surrounded by allies.

ko: A trained front-line brute. Hits hard, survives longer, and forces respect in early melee.

en: An orcish spellcaster who launches bolts from a safe distance. Close the gap fast before it punishes you.
ko: An orcish spellcaster who launches bolts from a safe distance. Close the gap fast before it punishes you.

en: A final mind turned inward until only terrible clarity remained. It tests not only your strength, but your understanding of what your run has become. The battle should feel like a culmination, not a skirmish.
ko: A final mind turned inward until only terrible clarity remained. It tests not only your strength, but your understanding of what your run has become. The battle should feel like a culmination, not a skirmish.

en: A ghost-like undead that resists cold and slips through walls. Spatial awareness matters here.
ko: A ghost-like undead that resists cold and slips through walls. Spatial awareness matters here.

ko: A weak scavenger, dangerous only in numbers. It teaches the first lesson of any dungeon: carelessness still costs blood.

en: A mid-tier demon with fire resistance and steady melee. Survivable with the right preparation.
ko: A mid-tier demon with fire resistance and steady melee. Survivable with the right preparation.

en: A powerful undead with draining melee. It recovers from damage and fights on long after you expect it to fall.
ko: A powerful undead with draining melee. It recovers from damage and fights on long after you expect it to fall.

en: A venomous arachnid whose tail ends fights poorly. Poison resistance reduces its danger sharply.
ko: A venomous arachnid whose tail ends fights poorly. Poison resistance reduces its danger sharply.

en: A swift shade that phases through darkness, draining life with each pass.
ko: A swift shade that phases through darkness, draining life with each pass.

ko: A wandering zealot wrapped in smoke and sacred heat. Fire is both her weapon and her warning. Prepare for sustained pressure rather than a single burst.

en: An undead fighter that shrugs off cold damage. It hits like a soldier and dies hard.
ko: An undead fighter that shrugs off cold damage. It hits like a soldier and dies hard.

en: An immense sovereign of living acid, its mass dissolves everything it touches.
ko: An immense sovereign of living acid, its mass dissolves everything it touches.

ko: An early dragon that breathes scalding steam. Stay mobile and do not let it breathe on you twice.

en: A colossus of living rock that hurls boulders with crushing force. Keep moving and do not stand still.
ko: A colossus of living rock that hurls boulders with crushing force. Keep moving and do not stand still.

ko: An ancient sentinel of weight, order, and refusal. It endures what would break lesser foes and grinds down reckless attackers. This is not a fight to rush without force to back it up.

ko: A master of wrath from above, chaining pressure into disaster. It turns space into danger and punishes exposed movement. Enter this fight with a plan, not hope.

ko: A poison-breathing dragon that turns the field toxic. Poison resistance converts a dangerous fight into a manageable one.

ko: The apex of giant-kind. Its presence alone warrants respect, and its reach warrants fear.

en: A massive brute with frightening endurance. If you cannot kill it cleanly, the fight quickly gets worse.
ko: A massive brute with frightening endurance. If you cannot kill it cleanly, the fight quickly gets worse.

en: Two heads mean two brains and twice the swings. Expect rapid repeated attacks at close range.
ko: Two heads mean two brains and twice the swings. Expect rapid repeated attacks at close range.

ko: An undead noble who drains life on every hit. The drain accumulates quickly if you let the fight drag.

ko: A small bloodsucking bat — faster than a normal bat and prone to draining HP on a hit.

ko: An armored vampire with high HP and cold resistance. Do not let the drain stack — end it fast or burn an escape.

ko: A venom-priest whose faith runs through fang and ritual. Poison is its language, and patience is its cruelty. Enter the fight ready to answer venom quickly.

ko: A massive warwolf ridden by goblinoids. Powerful and aggressive — it does not give ground.

en: A malevolent undead warrior with draining melee. Attack it fast before drain stacks up.
ko: A malevolent undead warrior with draining melee. Attack it fast before drain stacks up.

ko: A fast hunter that punishes hesitation. Dangerous when it reaches you before you are ready.

ko: A hungry spirit wrapped in malice. It is often more dangerous than its body suggests, and should not be underestimated.

ko: A lesser dragon with good speed and a venomous tail. Fast enough that evasion alone is not enough.

ko: A large grazing animal that charges when threatened. The first hit often hurts the most.

ko: A slow and mindless undead. Easy to outmaneuver, but its hits still carry weight.

ko: Stout and resilient. +2 STR, -3 DEX, +1 HP. Innate poison resistance.

ko: Living stone. +3 STR, -3 DEX, -2 HP. Natural AC +4 and immune to poison.

ko: Tiny but fleet. -4 STR, +2 DEX, +1 INT, -3 HP, +1 MP. Fastest in the dungeon.

ko: Huge and regenerating. +7 STR, -3 DEX, -4 INT, +3 HP, -1 MP. Vulnerable to fire.

ko: Undead predator. -1 STR, +1 DEX, +2 INT. Resistant to negative energy; melee kills restore HP.

ko: Animates the spirits of the recently fallen. Creates temporary undead allies from recent kills.

ko: Animates skeletal remains as a temporary ally. Cheap and useful — best from durable enemy corpses.

ko: Teleports you a short distance away. Fast escape from bad positioning or surrounded situations.

ko: Calls a small imp to fight at your side. Early summoning option; the imp is fragile but draws attention.

ko: Lightning deals 10d8 and bounces to up to 3 nearby targets.

ko: Confuses the target, causing random movement. Neutralizes a dangerous enemy without dealing damage.

ko: Conjures a burst of magical flame around you. Most effective when surrounded or in melee range.

ko: A bolt of freezing energy chills the target. Fast and cheap; a solid early cold spell.

ko: Unleashes a glacial torrent that encases all nearby in ice. Your strongest cold spell — clears groups fast.

ko: Fills the target with overwhelming magical terror. Sends an enemy fleeing — useful for disengaging or splitting groups.

ko: The air itself ignites in a catastrophic conflagration. Your most powerful fire spell — save it for the hardest moments.

ko: Violently deconstructs stone and bone alike. Strong area damage, especially against heavily armored or undead foes.

ko: Hurls a massive crystalline spear of pure force. Deals extreme single-target damage regardless of resistances.

ko: A bolt of lightning arcs between enemies. Damages the chain — best with multiple targets in line.

ko: Opens a gateway to a malign realm, summoning powerful beings. Your strongest summoning spell — fills the room with danger for everyone.

ko: A dart of fire scorches the target. Low cost and reliable — your first fire spell.

ko: Shatters the earth itself, dealing massive area damage. Your most powerful earth spell — ends most fights outright.

ko: A jolt of electricity zaps a nearby enemy. Very cheap; bridges the gap until better spells unlock.

ko: A translocation shroud distorts your position (+EV). Makes you harder to hit without sacrificing offense.

ko: Slows and weakens the target's attacks. Buys time and reduces threat from fast or powerful enemies.

ko: A sharp shard of stone pierces the target. Cheap and accurate; a solid general-purpose earth spell.

ko: Summons a swarm of creatures from the abyss. Creates many bodies to absorb damage and crowd enemies.

ko: Drains life from the target to heal yourself. Doubles as offense and recovery — most valuable at low HP.
양손 무기 — 방패를 사용할 수 없다.

en: A corpse rises to serve you!
A crushing darkness fills the air. Something ancient stirs...
ko: 압도적인 어둠이 공기를 채운다. 무언가 고대의 존재가 깨어난다...

en: A dangerous presence lurks on this floor...
ko: 이 층에 위험한 존재가 도사리고 있다...

en: A lone guardian watches over the ruined pantheon...
ko: 외로운 수호자가 폐허의 만신전을 지키고 있다...

en: A loud noise echoes through the dungeon!
A powerful presence fills the chamber...
A spectral ally answers your call!
A thick fog fills the area.
Ancient power stirs. The altars glow with dormant faith.
ko: 고대의 힘이 깨어난다. 제단이 잠든 신앙으로 빛난다.

en: B%d — tap a tile (or arrows) to step, bump to attack.
ko: B%d — 타일을 탭(또는 방향키)해 이동, 부딪쳐 공격.

en: Choose a faith before attuning essences.
ko: 정수 동조 전에 신앙을 선택해야 한다.

en: Level up! You are now level %d.
Soaked! Lightning surges for extra damage!
ko: 흠뻑 젖었다! 번개가 추가 피해를 가한다!

en: Tap highlighted tile to cast %s — tap elsewhere to cancel.
ko: 강조된 타일을 탭해 %s 시전 — 다른 곳 탭으로 취소.

en: Tap the %s to cast %s — tap elsewhere to cancel.
ko: %s를 탭해 %s 시전 — 다른 곳 탭으로 취소.

en: The %s calls upon divine power — the %s is healed!
The %s is too powerful to affect!
ko: %s이(가) 너무 강해 영향을 줄 수 없다!

en: The %s pulses with deep power. (+%d XP)
The Abyss shifts... the exit has moved.
The Abyss warps around you. There is no way back.
ko: 심연이 그대를 휘감는다. 돌아갈 길은 없다.

en: The Abyssal Sovereign collapses. The dungeon trembles...
The Abyssal Sovereign's power surges — it moves with terrible speed!
ko: 심연 군주의 힘이 폭주한다 — 무서운 속도로 움직인다!

en: The Sovereign's servants heed its call!
The environment here is hostile — a protective essence manifests.
ko: 이곳의 환경이 적대적이다 — 보호 정수가 나타난다.

en: The environment here is hostile — a protective ring lies nearby.
ko: 이곳의 환경이 적대적이다 — 근처에 보호 반지가 있다.

en: The scroll ignites in a blazing inferno!
The silence finds no voices nearby.
The tome is beyond your current intellect.
ko: 이 책은 그대의 현재 지능으로는 다룰 수 없다.

en: The wand carves through %d tile%s of stone.
The wand finds no wall to dig.
The wand pulses with digging energy.
You already know all spells in this tome.
ko: 이 책의 모든 주문을 이미 알고 있다.

en: You bind %s to your first essence slot.
You enter a berserk rage. (+4 STR)
You feel a surge of speed.
You feel resistant to fire, cold and poison.
ko: 화염, 냉기, 독에 저항이 생긴 느낌이다.

en: You have no equipment to brand.
You return to the main dungeon.
You vanish in a flash of light.
Your current faith does not allow essence attunement.
ko: 현재 신앙은 정수 동조를 허락하지 않는다.

en: Your weapon glows with new power.
